records.ety: [NL., fr. Gr. <?/, fr. <?/ to squint, fr. <?/ distorted, squinting.]

defs: An affection of one or both eyes, in which the optic axes can not be directed to the same object, -- a defect due either to undue contraction or to undue relaxation of one or more of the muscles which move the eyeball; squinting; cross-eye.
